title: Company Names Tribunal decision: The Ivy Hotel Collection Ltd
body: "Application number 5258  Applicant Caprice Holdings Limited objected to the name used by The Ivy Hotel Collection Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 July 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of The Ivy Hotel Collection Ltd is changed to 15796108, Ltd. "
